mapper.select: SELECT * FROM "user" WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM "user" WHERE display_name = #{displayName} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM "user" WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "user" (id, display_name, email, avatar, password_hash, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, 0)
